allow: Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 sharetime -e "DESCRIBE users; SELECT email, LEFT\(mot_de_passe,20\) as mdp_debut, pseudo, date_naissance FROM users WHERE email='admin@sharetime.fr';")

Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as users FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as activities FROM activities; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as registrations FROM registrations;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as faq FROM faq;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT idusers FROM users LIMIT 1;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as activites FROM activities; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as users FROM users;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT idusers, nom, prenom, pseudo, email, role FROM users;")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "UPDATE users SET pseudo = 'Admin' WHERE email = 'admin@sharetime.fr';")
Bash(c:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -h 127.0.0.1 sharetime -e "SELECT email, role, is_banned FROM users;")
